channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light out, 22nd April
item.description:
The street light at the end of Palace square is out and it's very dark especially when walking next to the park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and rubbish outside 121 elderfield rd, e5, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped mattress outside 121 Elderfield Rd, E5. Also domestic rubbish spilling out onto the pavement from the big metal bins next to 121 Elderfield Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
Wooden debris large pieces of broken furniture, door left on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Club Gardens Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped some time last night and wasn't picked up with the rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter flyposted, 22nd April
item.description:
This area is constantly being illegally flytipped. please remove and investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Flickering Street lamp, 22nd April
item.description:
On footbridge above the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 393, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Bus stop flyposted, 22nd April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping on furled rd, 22nd April
item.description:
Please remove

item.title: Cars parked, 22nd April
item.description:
Cars parked on double yellow lines
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 274, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Detritus left post bin collection, 22nd April
item.description:
Yet another week of stuff left uncollected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 305, Trinity Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of large gas bottles, dumped., 22nd April
item.description:
A full box of new large gas bottles has been dumped a the back of the footway on The Close, near the St Johns Road end.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bumper, 22nd April
item.description:
The bumper on the road helps to reduce the speed on Charlton Church lane, however when heavy vehicle such as bus drive on it makes the building at number 74 Charlton Church lane shake. The vibration are perceived throughout the building and over time are creating cracks on wall. I would appreciate if the bumper could be made more smooth or if the council would consider to re-direct heavy vehicle to other routes. This is an ongoing issue for years.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bins permanently on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Wheelie bins permanently on pavement causing problems with ability to use the footpath as it should be 199 brook Street erith Kent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and rubbish on ground, 22nd April
item.description:
Overflowing bin, rubbish blown around in The Crescent and Church Avenue. The bin is corner of Church avenue/junction The Crescent . Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on side of Nags Head Pub, corner Scena Way & Camberwell Rd, 22nd April
item.description:
2 months old Offensive language possibly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 242, Camberwell Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking drive and double yellow blips, 22nd April
item.description:
Blocking emergency access driveway as well.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden panels and chair, 22nd April
item.description:
Wooden panels and chair here for 1 week, opposite 4 Swinford Gardens. Please collect. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James's Crescent, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags dumped outside a house on Well Hall Road and people have pulled them apart and spread rubbish all over the pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Someone has moved out and left lots of black bags on the pavement outside their house that the bin men did not take today. People have been fighting over the contents and have spread the rubbish all over the pavement. It's an eyesore and a hazard. P

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flu tipping on the corner of Coleman road, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped construction waste on the corner of Coleman road and Wells Way, near the BT box Also the photo of the perpetrator, who was caught on act but refused to take ownership of the items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
